$schema: Manifest consumed by scripts/build-share-index.mjs to render share/index.html.

site.title: Centella — Share
site.lede: A working portfolio of self-contained outputs — anything Centella has produced for an audience outside our own walls. Each entry is a live link, refreshed every time we ship.
site.footer: Maintained by hand in share/_index.json. The page itself regenerates with `npm run share:index` (or as part of `npm run share:build`).

site.title: Centella — Work
site.lede: Brochures, one-pagers, and design directions Centella has produced for partners and clients. Each entry is a live link — open it in a browser, share the URL, hand off the file.
site.footer: Filtered view of share/_index.json projects whose artifacts live under share/work/. Regenerates with `npm run share:index`.

projects.title: NGL Barcelona
projects.description: Proposal for a Centella Institute pilot program based in Barcelona — the moment, the convening, the partners, the timeline. Sixteen slides, available in Spanish and English.

projects.title: Prime Movers · 20th Anniversary
projects.description: Printed program brochure for the twentieth-anniversary Prime Movers convening, produced by Centella for Hunt Alternatives. Four complete design directions — Contemporary, Spring Bloom, Heritage (WWP 2001), and Hunt Compass — each calibrated to a different register.
